def read_file_contents(path: str) -> str:
    f = open(path, "r")
    data = f.read()
    f.close()
    return data


def write_report(path: str, content: str) -> None:
    f = open(path, "w")
    f.write(content)
    f.close()


def connect_and_query(host: str, port: int) -> list[dict]:
    import socket

    sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    sock.connect((host, port))
    sock.send(b"QUERY ALL")
    data = sock.recv(4096)
    sock.close()
    return parse_response(data)


def parse_response(data: bytes) -> list[dict]:
    return []
